meta_desc: Find the right Hallucine inflatable cinema screen for your audience and event in a few clicks. Specifications and 2026 pricing.
photo_alt: A giant Hallucine inflatable cinema screen set up outdoors, with deckchairs facing the screen as dusk falls
hero_title: Which inflatable screen for your project?
hero_desc: Tell us your audience size and projection setting: we'll recommend the right Hallucine model, with its specifications and price.
prix_caption: Price excl. VAT — 2026 rates, delivery included
note_drivein: The Drive-in model has a raised image base at 3 m so cars in the back rows can see the screen. For a very large drive-in, we build to order — contact us.
note_interieur_grand: For this audience, the airtight range reaches its maximum size. Beyond that, outdoors, choose the blower range.
disclaimer: Indicative recommendation based on the Hallucine 2026 price list (prices excl. VAT, delivery included). The ideal size also depends on available viewing distance and ambient light — request a quote for a precise assessment.
